CustomField.description: שדה בחירה שתמאר סיבה עבור ביטול הזמנה של חדר פרטי
CustomField.inlineHelpText: שדה בחירה שתמאר סיבה עבור ביטול הזמנה של חדר פרטי
CustomField.label: Cancelation Reason Private Room

value.label: Not interested – few days of hospitalization
Not interested - in being alone in the room
Not interested – will get back to us if relevant
The surgery is performed at a site where the call center does not reserve rooms (Haifa, Ashdod, Be'er Sheva).
Patients called on the day of surgery to reserve a private room

value.fullName: Not interested - No hospitalization for surgery
value.label: Not interested - No hospitalization for surgery

value.fullName: Not interested - Patient does not know if he will stay
value.label: Not interested - Patient does not know if he will stay
